summary: GDPR Compliance & Admin Settings Testing Complete. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend features verified working. Admin settings correctly hides Subscription/Family Plan. GDPR consent toggles, data export, retention policy modal, and account deletion modal all functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GDPR compliance endpoints fully tested. Consent toggles persist to DB and log to consent_audit_log. Data export downloads JSON with all user data (estates, documents, messages, beneficiaries, activity logs). Retention policy shows 9 data categories. Deletion request validates email match and blocks users with active beneficiaries.

tested_features.admin_hides_subscription: PASS - Subscription Management hidden when user.role === 'admin'
tested_features.admin_hides_family_plan: PASS - Family Plan Settings hidden when user.role === 'admin'
tested_features.gdpr_section_visible: PASS - Privacy & Data Rights section visible
tested_features.consent_essential_disabled: PASS - Essential Services toggle is checked AND disabled
tested_features.consent_marketing_toggle: PASS - Marketing Emails toggles on/off and persists
tested_features.consent_analytics_toggle: PASS - Analytics Tracking toggles on/off and persists
tested_features.consent_third_party_toggle: PASS - Third-Party Data Sharing toggles on/off and persists
tested_features.put_consent_api: PASS - PUT /api/compliance/consent updates preferences and logs to audit
tested_features.data_export_download: PASS - Download My Data triggers JSON download with all user data
tested_features.retention_policy_modal: PASS - Modal shows all 9 retention categories with legal basis
tested_features.deletion_modal_email_validation: PASS - Delete button disabled until email matches exactly
tested_features.deletion_modal_cancel: PASS - Cancel button closes modal without action
tested_features.auth_required_all_endpoints: PASS - All compliance endpoints require authentication
